gameTitle: Elden Ring: Shadow of the Erdtree
overview: Massive DLC expansion set in the Land of Shadow, accessible via Mohg's arena. Features entirely new map, legacy dungeons, bosses, and the Scadutree Blessing progression system that scales power specifically for DLC content.
coreMechanics: Revered Spirit Ash upgrades (enhanced spirit summons)
New weapon types and Ashes of War
Torrent traversal in vertical Legacy Dungeons
Cross-map elevation changes and underground areas
New status effects and damage types

terminology.Scadutree Blessing: DLC power level (more important than character level)
terminology.Revered Spirit Ash: DLC upgrade material for Spirit Ashes
terminology.Shadow Realm: The DLC's map area (Land of Shadow)
terminology.Furnace Golem: Large walking furnace enemies patrolling areas
terminology.Cross: Map markers placed by Miquella showing his path

commonQuestions: How do I access the DLC?
Where do I find Scadutree Fragments?
What level should I be for the DLC?
Why am I doing so little damage?
How do I upgrade Spirit Ashes in the DLC?
Where is the nearest Site of Grace?
Can I leave and come back to the DLC?
What are Revered Spirit Ashes for?
insiderTips: Scadutree Blessing is MORE important than character level - prioritize fragments
DLC is balanced for Blessing 12-18, not character level 150
Many early Fragments are in Churches and ruins - explore thoroughly
Furnace Golems can be avoided entirely on Torrent - not mandatory
Revered Spirit Ashes make summons significantly stronger - huge power spike
Church of Consolation has 3 fragments nearby - excellent early boost
Base game level matters less - a level 100 with Blessing 15 > level 200 with Blessing 5
Most bosses are designed for Spirit Ash use - don't handicap yourself
Crosses on map show Miquella's path - follow for story progression

progressionSystem.spiritUpgrade: Revered Spirit Ashes at Roundtable Hold
progressionSystem.characterLevel: Less important than blessing level in DLC

accessRequirement: Must defeat Mohg, Lord of Blood AND Starscourge Radahn in base game. Interact with Miquella's cocoon in Mohg's arena.
